examples: Methamphetamine exists as two enantiomers, dextrorotary and levorotary.
Dextrorotary ammonium tartrate can be prepared from by product tartar produced in grape wine factory.
Ammonium bitartrate is filtrated and washed with water to remove Cl -, and then reacted with ammonia to give the final product dextrorotary ammonium tartrate.
